author: doll-agent
content: numpy.ma masked-array support delivered (f64 main slice). src/ma.rs binds: PyMaskedArray pyclass wrapping ferray_ma::MaskedArray<f64, IxDyn> with __new__/data/mask/shape/ndim/size/dtype getters, count/sum/mean/min/max/var/std reductions, sum_axis/mean_axis/min_axis/max_axis returning MaskedArray, filled(fill_value=None)/compressed methods, __repr__/__len__/__array__ (numpy protocol). Free constructors: array, masked_array, masked_where, masked_invalid, masked_equal/_not_equal/_greater/_greater_equal/_less/_less_equal, masked_inside, masked_outside. Helpers: count_masked, is_masked, getmask, getdata, filled, compressed at module level. Strategy: f64-only since PyO3 pyclass can't be generic; __array__ protocol lets numpy.asarray(ma) interoperate. 32 new pytest passing (480/480 total). Deferred: per-dtype variants, arithmetic (masked_add/_sub/_mul/_div), domain-aware ufuncs (sqrt_domain, log_domain), manipulation/sorting/IO, ma_apply_along_axis, ma set ops.
